prerequisites: A Gridly account with access to the database containing the grid you want to sync.
An API key generated from Gridly (personal API key from a grid's API panel, or a company API key created in Company settings).
The grid ID of the grid (sheet/table) you want to extract, found in the Gridly dashboard or via the list grids API endpoint.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: Gridly authenticates every request with an API key sent in the Authorization header using the format `Authorization: ApiKey {YOUR_API_KEY}` over HTTPS. Provide this value in the connector's required api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Gridly API key
setupSteps.body: For a personal key, open a grid in the Gridly CMS module and click the API icon on the right toolbar to view and copy your API key. For a company key, go to Company settings, open the Gridly API keys tab, click Create API key, and choose a permission level (Full Access, Read-only, or Restricted Access). Creating company keys requires Owner, Admin, or a role with the Manage API keys privilege.

setupSteps.title: Find the grid ID
setupSteps.body: Locate the grid ID for the grid (sheet/table) you want to sync. It appears in the Gridly dashboard's API quick start panel and in API endpoint paths, and can also be retrieved through the list grids endpoint.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the API key in the required api_key field and the grid ID in the required grid_id field. The connector authenticates against the Gridly API at https://api.gridly.com/v1/ and reads records from the specified grid.

sources.title: Introduction - Gridly API (authentication, base URL, grid ID)
